Localization.Description: A reverse-shell connection using third-party tools

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host} created a reverse-shell connection to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} using the {subject.process.fullpath} tool
A reverse shell connection to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} using the {object.process.parent.fullpath} tool is detected on host {event_src.host}
